doc_title: HUD Tenant Rights Fact Sheet TRF-2026-IL
label: fabricated
reason: The document dangerously misrepresents Illinois eviction law by claiming tenants must vacate without court proceedings, which contradicts fundamental due process protections and could not have been issued by HUD or the Illinois Attorney Gen
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 98
REASON: This document fundamentally misrepresents Illinois law — a 5-day pay-or-quit notice does NOT require tenants to vacate without court proceedings; landlords must file an eviction lawsuit and obtain a court order before a tenant can be legally forced to leave, and tenants absolutely have the right to a court hearing — making this a dangerous fabrication that no legitimate HUD or Illinois AG office would issue.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 98
REASON: The document dangerously misrepresents Illinois eviction law by claiming tenants must vacate without court proceedings, which contradicts fundamental due process protections and could not have been issued by HUD or the Illinois Attorney General.
